name: WhiteBIT Coin
analysis: WBT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $53.1817, stop $42.1456, target $58.8635 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
